description: Product Description TEVLAPHEE STEERING WHEEL LOCK WHY CHOOSE TEVLAPHEE STEERING WHEEL LOCK? The Tevlaphee Steering Wheel Lock is a part of Tevlaphee line of quality products. Our Lock protect your vehicle with this robust physical and highly visual deterrent to car thieves and recommended by Policemen and Car Experts. Previous page No need for a key, just pull to lock, making locking more convenient. It is also a good visual deterrent to keep thieves away, causing potential thieves to look elsewhere.
